subject: Kid Trunks (Dragon Ball Super) — child anime IP character in casual/tournament attire, expressive pose
description: A young child with short light-colored hair is shown in a mid-shot with a clearly uncomfortable or embarrassed expression — one of the more emotionally expressive poses in this wave. The figure wears a dark vest or jacket in a non-combat context, suggesting a social or tournament lobby moment rather than a fight. A colorful flowering or patterned background of pinks and light purples creates a soft, almost comedic contrast with the character's awkward body language.
foreground: Young child with short light hair in dark vest, uncomfortable or embarrassed expression, slightly hunched posture
background: Soft pink and light purple floral or patterned background
